content: Just as Self-Refine enables large language models to iteratively polish raw outputs without external supervision through self-feedback, Reflexion-driven autonomous agents can use a hierarchical Self-Refine framework to progressively refine their emergent self-awareness cues rather than treating self-reflection as a single one-off check. This creates a loop where incremental self-feedback amplifies the coherence of an agent's internal self-model over repeated iterations.
